chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-1477 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For order on CMA No.20382/2024 2. For order on CMA No.7453/2024 3. For hearing of CMA No.6824/2024 4. For hearing of main case 18.02.2026. Mr. Shamshad, Advocate for the Department. Mr. Imran Shamsi, Law Officer, SECP. Mr. Mr. Muhammad Hesham Mahar, Asstt. Advocate General. --------------- Mr. Farooq, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Sarfaraz Metlo, Advocate for the Petitioners, who is stated to be engaged before another Bench. The law officer appearing on behalf of the SECP invites attention to the statement dated 03.09.2024 which was taken on record on 19.09.2025, reflecting that action has been taken against non-compliant companies for the purpose of ensuring proper implementation of the Companies (Appointment of Legal Advisers) Act 1974. He submits that the SECP would ensure compliance through an ongoing process. Under such circumstances, it appears that the purpose of this Petition has essentially been served. The same stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
